{{Quote|Jaden, I'm sending you to Hoth, where I had a vision of Obi-Wan Kenobi. I imagine there is a pretty strong aura there.|Jedi Master Luke Skywalker assigning Jaden Korr to Hoth|<ref name="Academy" />}}
The '''mission to Hoth''' was carried out by [[Jaden Korr]] in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]] during the [[Disciples of Ragnos crisis]].

==Background==
The [[Disciples of Ragnos]], a [[Sith cult/Legends|Sith cult]], has stolen information from [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] records about locations where he felt a strong connection to the Force. Skywalker sent members of the [[New Jedi Order]] to investigate these places and find out what the cult was up to.<ref name="Academy" />

==The mission==
{{Quote|What's that? I guess I'd better check it out.|[[Jaden Korr]] notices the Imperial beacons on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]|<ref name="Academy" />}}
Jaden Korr, then a [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] at the [[Jedi Praxeum|Jedi Academy]], was sent to [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] to investigate the area where Skywalker once encountered the [[Force ghost/Legends|ghost]] of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] for [[Vergence/Legends|Force nexus]] energy.<ref name="Academy" />

Once reaching the location with his ''[[Far Wanderer]]'', Korr could not sense any Force energy and considered whether Skywalker was wrong about his intuitions. Just then, he detected a flashing beacon and decided to investigate. It turned out that the beacons formed a path through the snowy canyons, where Korr encountered many [[Cold assault stormtrooper|snowtroopers]] and [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]], even an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]], thus confirming the [[Imperial Remnant]] and the [[Disciples of Ragnos]]'s interest in the area, and also a few [[Wampa/Legends|wampas]].<ref name="Academy" />

[[File:AlmostGrayden.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Jaden Korr]] in [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]].]]
Eventually, Korr came to the ruins of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]]. However, the main entrance was locked, and Korr had to find other means of entering. He got into Echo Base through an underground tunnel, connecting the base with a wrecked [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]], which was heavily guarded by Imperial forces.

[[File:JadenVsAlora.jpg|thumb|Jaden Korr confronts Alora in Echo Base]]
In the base, Korr overheard a [[Sith cultist/Legends|cultist]] communicating to a person named [[Alora (Dark Jedi)|Alora]] about [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. Making his way through the corridors, Korr entered a large room, where he encountered Alora, a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] and [[Tavion Axmis|Tavion's]] apprentice. She challenged Korr to a duel. Korr emerged victorious, as Alora fled through a hole in the ceiling.<ref name="Academy" />

==Aftermath==
Having completed the mission, Korr returned to the Jedi Academy, where he was considered to have passed the [[Initiate Trials/Legends|Jedi Initiate Trials]] and was promoted to the rank of [[Padawan/Legends|Apprentice]].<ref name="Academy" /> The results of the mission were documented in the [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] [[Tauntaun Feathers A1]].<ref name="Wizard">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031218hoth4|series=Hoth: Under the Ice|text=Part 4: A Brief Thaw}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Hoth: Under the Ice]]'' presents this mission as carried out by both Jaden Korr and [[Kyle Katarn]], while in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' it is a solo mission for Korr.<ref name="Academy" />

This is the only level of the game where the player does not wear the clothing selected at the beginning of the game (as the outfits would be impractical in the extreme cold).<ref name="Academy" />

It is possible to find the main entrance of Echo Base, but it is locked. The ruins of what appears to be Echo Base's shield generator are also findable, though they appear far smaller than in other games.<ref name="Academy" />

Through the use of [[Force speed/Legends|Force speed]] it is possible to save a Tauntaun from the Wampa near the end of the level and use it in the duel with Alora. However, due to the difficulty involved, this is most likely non-canon.<ref name="Academy" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
